languages.original_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

languages.text: "Очень примечательная подборка геральдических символов и родовых артефактов священных династий. Интересно, как давно реликвии... хранятся в этом странном месте".
languages.translation_comment: found the belongings of all the Rogue Traders of Koronus in the Trazyn Museum (an exhibit with them)

languages.text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."
languages.original_text: "Очень примечательная подборка геральдических символов и родовых артефактов священных династий. Интересно, как давно реликвии... хранятся в этом странном месте".

traits.locale_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."
"A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."
"A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

languages.text: 「聖なる王朝の家紋や遺物、とても素晴らしいコレクションですね。この奇妙な場所に遺物が保管されてきたのは、どれほど長い間でしょうか」
languages.original_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる王朝の家紋や遺物、とても素晴らしいコレクションですね。この奇妙な場所に遺物が保管されてきたのは、どれほど長い間でしょうか。」

languages.text: « Une impressionnante collection de symboles héraldiques et d'artefacts familiaux provenant de dynasties sacrées. Je me demande depuis combien de temps ces reliques sont... conservées dans cet étrange endroit. »
languages.original_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

traits.locale_text: « Une impressionnante collection de symboles héraldiques et d'artefacts familiaux provenant de dynasties sacrées. Je me demande depuis combien de temps ces reliques sont... conservées dans cet étrange endroit. »

languages.text: "Eine sehr bemerkenswerte Sammlung heraldischer Symbole und familiärer Artefakte heiliger Dynastien. Ich frage mich, wie lange die Relikte schon ... an diesem seltsamen Ort sind."
languages.original_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

traits.locale_text: "Eine sehr bemerkenswerte Sammlung heraldischer Symbole und familiärer Artefakte heiliger Dynastien. Ich frage mich, wie lange die Relikte schon ... an diesem seltsamen Ort sind."

languages.text: "Çok etkileyici bir hanedanlık sembolleri ve kutsal hanedanlıkların aile yadigârları koleksiyonu. Yadigârların ne kadar süredir bu tuhaf yerde... Tutulduğunu merak ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

traits.locale_text: "Çok etkileyici bir hanedanlık sembolleri ve kutsal hanedanlıkların aile yadigârları koleksiyonu. Yadigârların ne kadar süredir bu tuhaf yerde... Tutulduğunu merak ediyorum."

languages.text: «Una colección impresionante de motivos heráldicos y reliquias familiares de dinastías sagradas. Me pregunto cuánto tiempo llevan... almacenadas en este extraño lugar».
languages.original_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

traits.locale_text: «Una colección impresionante de motivos heráldicos y reliquias familiares de dinastías sagradas. Me pregunto cuánto tiempo llevan... almacenadas en este extraño lugar».

languages.text: “相当惊人的收藏——尽是些神圣王朝的纹章标志与家族遗物。不知这些圣物到底在这鬼地方保存了多久……”
languages.original_text: "A very impressive collection of heraldic symbols and family artefacts of sacred dynasties. I wonder how long the relics have been... kept in this strange place."

traits.locale_text: “相当惊人的收藏——尽是些神圣王朝的纹章标志与家族遗物。不知这些圣物到底在这鬼地方保存了多久……”
